programme.title: NBC Nightly News
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's main headlines in the US and around the world

programme.title: Asia Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Squawk Box' is CNBC´´s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Asia Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Squawk Box' is CNBC´´s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Nancy Hungerford and Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Street Signs' follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. From the anchor desk to trading desks around the region, 'Street Signs' helps viewers capitalize on the plays of the day

programme.title: Capital Connection
programme.desc: Hosted by Matthew Taylor at the Singapore Exchange (SGX) and Hadley Gamble at Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM), 'Capital Connection' gives you a reading on Asia's markets mid-day and sets you up for the Middle East and European trading day

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Europe Street Signs
programme.desc: A rundown of the latest business news and reviews from Wall Street

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC´´s 'Worldwide Exchange' delivers actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Brian Sullivan, the program prepares CNBC's worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action

programme.title: US CNBC Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor

programme.title: Squawk on the Street
programme.desc: The latest goings-on, live from the New York Stock Exchange

programme.title: Squawk on the Street
programme.desc: The latest goings-on, live from the New York Stock Exchange

programme.title: US Squawk Alley
programme.desc: The destination for news regarding tech on CNBC

programme.title: Fast Money Half Time Report
programme.desc: Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Business news and analysis from CNBC

programme.title: US Power Lunch
programme.desc: Tyler Mathisen, Melissa Lee and Kelly Evans take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis

programme.title: US Closing Bell
programme.desc: A close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, 'Fast Money' breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Documentaire.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Stories behind some of the biggest corporate crimes in the US, as well as cases of insurance fraud, bank robbery, money laundering and identity theft

programme.title: CNBC Sports
programme.desc: NBC Sports offers every sports fan a front row ticket to some of the biggest sporting events around the world. From the excitement of the PGA Golf circuit to highlights from recent yachting and motor sports events

programme.title: CNBC Sports
programme.desc: NBC Sports offers every sports fan a front row ticket to some of the biggest sporting events around the world. From the excitement of the PGA Golf circuit to highlights from recent yachting and motor sports events

programme.title: Mobil 1 - The Grid
programme.desc: Motor sport coverage, featuring a weekly round-up of some of the world's biggest competitions. Plus, interviews with drivers and behind-the-scenes footage from practice sessions and races, as well as challenges for viewers

programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Squawk Box' is CNBC´´s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Nancy Hungerford and Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Street Signs' follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. From the anchor desk to trading desks around the region, 'Street Signs' helps viewers capitalize on the plays of the day

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Nancy Hungerford and Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Street Signs' follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. From the anchor desk to trading desks around the region, 'Street Signs' helps viewers capitalize on the plays of the day

programme.title: Capital Connection
programme.desc: Hosted by Matthew Taylor at the Singapore Exchange (SGX) and Hadley Gamble at Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM), 'Capital Connection' gives you a reading on Asia's markets mid-day and sets you up for the Middle East and European trading day

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC´´s 'Worldwide Exchange' delivers actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Brian Sullivan, the program prepares CNBC's worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action

programme.title: US CNBC Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor

programme.desc: The latest goings-on, live from the New York Stock Exchange

programme.title: US Squawk Alley
programme.desc: The destination for news regarding tech on CNBC

programme.title: Fast Money Half Time Report
programme.desc: Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Business news and analysis from CNBC

programme.title: US Power Lunch
programme.desc: Tyler Mathisen, Melissa Lee and Kelly Evans take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis

programme.title: US Closing Bell
programme.desc: A close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting

programme.title: US Closing Bell
programme.desc: A close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting

programme.title: CNBC Debate
programme.desc: Debat over een actueel onderwerp

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: American chat show, featuring guests from the world of showbusiness

programme.title: NBC Nightly News
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's main headlines in the US and around the world

programme.title: Asia Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Squawk Box' is CNBC´´s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Asia Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Squawk Box' is CNBC´´s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Nancy Hungerford and Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), 'Street Signs' follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. From the anchor desk to trading desks around the region, 'Street Signs' helps viewers capitalize on the plays of the day

programme.title: Capital Connection
programme.desc: Hosted by Matthew Taylor at the Singapore Exchange (SGX) and Hadley Gamble at Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM), 'Capital Connection' gives you a reading on Asia's markets mid-day and sets you up for the Middle East and European trading day

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC´´s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, 'Squawk Box' provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news

programme.title: Europe Street Signs
programme.desc: A rundown of the latest business news and reviews from Wall Street

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC´´s 'Worldwide Exchange' delivers actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Brian Sullivan, the program prepares CNBC's worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action

programme.title: US CNBC Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor
